message: ci: setup zig in web-ci lint job

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,11 @@ jobs:
           sudo apt-get update
           sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev
 
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: latest
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
